items.how_used: 使用 NetLogo 构建基于智能体的仿真模型，模拟不同驾驶策略和标志位置对交通拥堵的影响。
items.source_excerpt: we built computational simulations using NetLogo agent-based modeling to determine the effects of each road crossing strategy across a major highway.

items.how_used: 使用公平性和效率两个指标对策略进行加权求和评价，其中公平性基于 Rawlsian 逻辑，效率基于规则功利主义。
items.source_excerpt: Using metrics of fairness and efficiency grounded in mathematical philosophy, including Rawlsian logic and rule utilitarianism, the viabilities of various strategies of road crossing and placements of lane closure were analyzed.

items.how_used: 对推荐策略进行灵敏度分析，确保其鲁棒性。
items.source_excerpt: We then performed sensitivity analyses on our recommendations to ensure their robustness.

items.how_used: 创建概率密度函数来估计车道关闭情况下车辆分布，用于确定最佳标志位置。
items.source_excerpt: we created probability density functions to estimate the distributions of cars on a roadway in lane closure situations to create an algorithm usable by policymakers to determine optimal sign placement

items.how_used: 使用牛顿力学建立简单合并模型，包括距离和加速度关系，推导合并条件。
items.source_excerpt: A simple version of the decision to merge to an adjacent lane can be modeled by Newtonian physics. ... The maximum acceleration was also determined using Newtonian physics.

items.how_used: 引言部分清晰阐述问题背景、研究目标和解决策略，包括文献引用和问题分析。
items.source_excerpt: Road rage is commonplace in our society but has vastly detrimental impacts. ... The objective of the problem is to analyze the different actions and behaviors of the drivers and their impacts on the fairness and the efficiency of the situation under different circumstances.

items.how_used: 论文中包含带标题的示意图，如 Figure 1: Schematic of simple merging dynamics。

items.how_used: 使用示意图展示简单合并动力学，辅助说明模型。
